section.div: Browser tool that shows who likes your Instagram posts the most. Ranked leaderboards for followers and non-followers.
Personal finance dashboard -- turn messy Excel bank statements into 23 pages of beautiful analytics. Self-hosted, multi-currency, zero subscriptions.

Folk-art portfolio of Megha Seth -- Madhubani, Pichwai, Lippan, Gond, and texture work. Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind 4, on Vercel with Neon + Cloudflare R2.

AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
JavaScript in-page GUI agent. Control web interfaces with natural language.
f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.
